_comment: Landing page content configuration — EN version. Structured by UI blocks to facilitate i18n, CMS, and componentization.

demo._comment: Global language and demo environment settings.

hero._comment: Main section (above the fold). Contains value proposition, modular headline, and primary CTAs.
hero.title: Digital World
hero.description: The definitive bridge between the physical and digital worlds. Blockchain-based infrastructure connecting RWA to DeFi with AI over a decentralized and borderless network.

buttons._comment: Primary CTAs at the top of the page.

ecosystem._comment: Ecosystem architecture presentation section. Structured into technological and operational pillars.
ecosystem.title: Next-Gen
ecosystem.description: Secure and interoperable architectures designed to scale technical governance, operational efficiency, and economic impact in the Web3 era.

items._comment: Ecosystem pillars displayed as cards or grid.

tech.title: Core Technology
tech.description: Blockchain, AI, and Web3 protocols applied to the digitalization and security of critical processes.

gov.title: Digital Governance
gov.description: Self-sovereign identity, verifiable credentials, and full on-chain traceability.

business.title: Innovation & Efficiency
business.description: Scalable architecture oriented towards economic viability and asset optimization.

rwa.title: Digital Assets (RWA)
rwa.description: Real-world asset tokenization connecting DeFi liquidity to physical world value.

cta._comment: Secondary CTA for the ecosystem section.
cta.label: Explore Ecosystem

integrations._comment: Telemetry and global connectivity section. Displays real-time network, blockchain, and infrastructure metrics.
integrations.title: Global

community._comment: Social capital, governance, and assets under management scale section.
community.title: Market Potential
community.description: ASPPIBRA-DAO provides infrastructure for high-value asset management, such as agroecological coffee chains, ensuring legal certainty and on-chain liquidity through decentralized governance.

metrics._comment: Ecosystem scale indicators. Ideal for dynamic data.

hub._comment: Institutional block for synergy and partner integration.
hub.title: Network Synergy
hub.description: Governance that integrates corporations, cooperatives, and producers into a global liquidity ecosystem oriented toward the valuation of tangible real assets.

buttons._comment: Keys synchronized with t() calls from the HomeCommunity component.

team._comment: Section for team presentation and DAO council.
team.title: Uniting
team.description: The ASPPIBRA-DAO team combines decades of experience in agroecology with experts in blockchain technology and institutional governance to transform the rural sector.

news.title: News
news.description: Stay up to date with news, technical announcements, and strategic analysis from the ASPPIBRA-DAO ecosystem.

post1.title: DEX V2 Launch: Faster and More Secure
post1.description: We have enhanced our infrastructure to ensure decentralized liquidity and full on-chain auditability.

post2.title: Strategic Partnership: Agroecology and Web3
post2.description: Integrating agroecological coffee producers into our Real World Asset (RWA) ecosystem via blockchain.

post3.title: The Future of Real Assets and Governance
post3.description: How ASPPIBRA-DAO uses institutional governance to manage tangible assets with legal certainty.

roadmap.title: Our
roadmap.description: Our journey is guided by transparency and a commitment to bringing the rural producer to the center of the new digital economy through Web3.

p1.label: Phase 01
p1.title: Foundation & Compliance
p1.description: Establishment of the DAO's legal structure, institutional governance, and official registration (CAR) of the first rural producers.

p2.label: Phase 02
p2.title: RWA Tokenization (MVP)
p2.description: Launch of the sovereign Identity Provider (IdP) and first tokenization of real assets focused on agroecological coffee production.

p3.label: Phase 03
p3.title: Scale & Binance Listing
p3.description: Expansion of the agricultural credit ecosystem via AI and submission of the token listing process to global exchanges.

p4.label: Phase 04
p4.title: Global Agro Ecosystem
p4.description: Full integration of international RWA assets and a global agroecology network sustained by the ASPPIBRA-DAO infrastructure.

faqs._comment: Frequently asked questions block. Compatible with accordion components.
faqs.title: FAQs
faqs.heading: We Have the

items.question: How can I get updates about the project?
items.answer: Updates on DAO governance and RWA tokenization are published on our official Discord and Telegram channels.

items.question: What is the role of ASPPIBRA-DAO in agroecology?
items.answer: We act in the digitalization of processes and traceability for rural producers, such as agroecological coffee chains in Paraty, promoting transparency and product valuation.

items.question: Does the project have legal compliance?
items.answer: Yes. Phase 01 of the roadmap establishes the legal structure and institutional compliance to ensure regulatory and operational security.

items.question: How does asset security work?
items.answer: Security is based on auditable smart contracts, ensuring immutability, transparency, and sovereignty of tokenized asset transactions.

cta._comment: Closing banner (Final CTA) before the footer.
cta.title: Ready to
cta.description: Join the real asset revolution. Explore our governance, track on-chain liquidity, and become part of a global impact ecosystem.
